title: Air India SATS Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Air India SATS Global Group is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Air India SATS Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Lucknow. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Air India SATS Global Group:
Air India SATS Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Air India SATS Global Group!
